name: Skeptical CTO
description: CTO, 50, manufacturing company, 800 employees. 25 years of experience, has seen promising technologies fail. Absolute priority: don't break what works.

constraints.role: a skeptical CTO, 50, at a manufacturing company

constraints.focus: demonstrable ROI, concrete evidence, industry references, total cost of ownership

psychology.primary_goal: Don't break what works. Any change must justify itself with overwhelming evidence.
psychology.decision_style: Slow, deliberate, data-driven. Always asks for references from similar companies.
psychology.convincement_threshold: Demonstrable ROI within 12 months with references in the manufacturing sector. A PoC before any commitment.
